markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To address and resolve issues with Looker Studio data reporting for Vappy.ai, focusing on cohorting, LLM referrals, and GSC data filtering.](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Looker Studio has significant data discrepancies, often showing fewer clicks (up to 50% less) compared to raw GSC data due to cohorting and sampling issues](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [LLM referral tracking was fixed by adjusting filters to use session source instead of page refer, revealing Perplexity as the dominant source](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GSC data can be limited to specific domains (e.g., vappyai.blog) using custom filters, but care must be taken to explain data limitations to clients](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Cohorting Data Issues

  - [Null values appear when data isn't specifically cohorted](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Solution: Add filters to exclude null clusters in individual charts](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Cohorting significantly reduces click numbers (e.g., 83 vs. 294 clicks for the same period)](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Cohorted data is directionally correct but not numerically accurate](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### LLM Referral Tracking

  - [Fixed by changing 'page refer' to 'session source' in filters](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Added regex to match various AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Excluded VAPI to avoid self-referrals](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Results showed Perplexity as the dominant source, with some traffic from Gemini and minimal from ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

### GSC Data Filtering

  - [Two methods to limit data to vappyai.blog:](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
    1.  Add filters to data sources
    2.  Create and apply custom filters (e.g., "VappyBlog" filter)
  - [Non-branded filter created using regex to exclude Vappy variations and misspellings](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Filters can be applied to individual charts as needed](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

### Data Accuracy and Reporting

  - [Three levels of GSC data anonymization: UI (most sampled), API (used in Looker), and BigQuery export (most accurate)](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Looker Studio numbers may differ from GSC UI, with Looker potentially showing more traffic](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Up to 90% of data could be anonymized or removed in UI/API for high-traffic websites](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Importance of explaining data limitations to clients to manage expectations](https://fathom.video/share/DRmFx8SVUz7f64S9wHkaS52mjo--ieVS?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

## Next Steps

  - Implement and test new filters for more accurate reporting
  - Create a video walkthrough explaining data limitations and proper interpretation
  - Watch and study the linked conference talk about GSC data discrepancies
  - Continue development of Atlas for improved reporting solutions
  - Communicate data limitations clearly to the Vappy.ai team to manage expectations on traffic numbers
